title: Undeclared library prior symbol classifier fixture

inputs.role: real source refs, source digests, target refs, and omission receipts
copied non-secret Lean/Std premise symbol index with provenance
positive real Ring2 symbol-boundary rows with candidate artifact digests
classifier policy and review-outcome contract over real symbol-boundary substrate
negative case: proof body field is present
negative case: private source ref is present
negative case: undeclared library prior does not bridge-escalate
negative case: cited unallowed premise is misclassified as library prior
negative case: allowed symbol is falsely quarantined
negative case: unqualified token claims qualified library-prior class
negative case: classifier claims theorem correctness authority

authority_ceiling: real Lean/Std symbol-boundary receipt only; not theorem correctness, Lean/Lake execution, proof bodies, private source refs, provider calls, or release readiness
anti_claim: This fixture validates copied non-secret Lean/Std symbol-boundary substrate and regression-only leakage guards; it does not prove theorem correctness, expose proof bodies, widen Lean/Lake execution, or authorize release.
purpose: Validate copied non-secret Lean/Std premise and Ring2 symbol-boundary substrate for undeclared library-prior classification, premise-budget precedence, and Mathlib-absence boundary context without exposing proof bodies or private refs.

secret_exclusion_rules.proof_bodies: forbidden; negative fixtures may carry regression-only forbidden-key rows and generated receipts may record key names only
secret_exclusion_rules.private_source_refs: forbidden except public-safe macro lineage refs and digests
secret_exclusion_rules.lean_lake: not executed by this organ; receipts carry copied run output and symbol-boundary refs only
